data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- LEOTEK/
data.description: At ITS America 2026, LEOTEK showcased Physical AI for enhancing road safety and efficiency. The update was issued by LEOTEK on 12-Jun-2026 through PR Newswire. The event highlighted advancements in technology aimed at making roadways safer and smarter. The demonstration featured a new photo. The innovative solutions presented are crucial for addressing the increasing traffic challenges faced by modern cities.

data.title: Tokenized Stocks, Bonds, and Yield-Bearing Assets Like SpaceX, Apple, Tesla, NVIDIA, and More Are Now Live on Uniswap
data.description: In New York, the global shift towards onchain assets is evident, from tokenized equities to yield-bearing assets. Access to these tokens on the Uniswap Protocol has been limited, but a change has occurred with the introduction of tokenized securities on the Uniswap Web App, Wallet, and API. This development allows users to explore and exchange tokenized forms of securities such as SpaceX, Apple, Tesla, NVIDIA, and others directly through Uniswap apps. The move aims to bring significant value onchain, with the number of tokenized securities available on Uniswap growing steadily.

data.title: Inception Growth Acquisition Limited Announces Additional Contribution to Trust Account to Extend Business Combination Period
data.description: On June 11, 2026, Inception Growth Acquisition Limited (NASDAQ: IGTA) deposited $12,203.33 into its trust account to prolong the deadline for completing a business combination by one month. This extends the deadline from June 13, 2026, to July 13, 2026. The purpose of the extension is to allow the Company more time to finalize a potential business merger or acquisition.

data.title: University of Utah and its foundation finalize deal to form Crimson Brand Partners
data.description: A high-caliber executive team, headed by Matt Webb, has propelled a new collaboration in college athletics. On June 12, 2026, in Salt Lake City, it was disclosed by the University of Utah and its associated foundation (University of Utah Growth Capital Partners Foundation) that they have officially solidified their alliance.

data.title: Inspire Investing Screens SpaceX Negative, Citing Ownership of X Platform Documented for Child Sexual Exploitation
data.description: Inspire Investing, the biggest Christian ETF provider globally, has announced that they will exclude SpaceX from any of their Inspire ETFs. This decision comes as a result of SpaceX's ownership of X (formerly Twitter) and the documented violations associated with it. The company's decision was based on the Inspire Impact Score. This news was revealed in Boise, Idaho, on June 12, 2026, through a PRNewswire announcement.

data.title: Bitcoin Could Drop Another 20% To $48,000 In Worst Case Scenario, Bitwise Exec Says
data.description: André Dragosch, Bitwise's Head of Research Europe, predicted that Bitcoin (BTC) could see a further 20% drop from its current levels. He identified the long-term holder cost basis at around $48,000 as the worst-case scenario. Dragosch outlined three support levels ranging from $48,000 to $61,000, including the 200-week moving average near $61,000, the realized price close to $56,000, and the long-term holder cost basis approximately at $48,000. These levels historically have attracted buyers, with $48,000 considered as the critical support if all three levels break down. Despite the bearish outlook, Bitwise's bottom-cycle probability model showed some improvement recently, although on-chain indicators remain below extreme levels.

data.title: AI ENGINES NOW INVENT $36B IN HEDGE FUND COLLAPSES -- AND 1 IN 5 CELEBRITY DEALS
data.description: New data from a joint study by 5W AI Communications unveiled the extent of AI hallucination in two sectors - endorsement assessment and principal reputation - within just one week. The study, released in Miami on June 12, 2026, highlighted the findings regarding these industries. The research emphasized significant statistics and trends regarding AI-generated hallucinations in these areas, shedding light on the potential impact on businesses.

data.title: KENT WORLDWIDE™ Celebrates the Grand Opening of the World's Best Cat Litter® Manufacturing Facility with a Ribbon-Cutting Event
data.description: In Muscatine, Iowa on June 12, 2026, KENT WORLDWIDE™ marked the inauguration of its new primary manufacturing plant for World's Best Cat Litter® with a ribbon-cutting event. The facility opening demonstrates a response to the growing demand for the product.

data.title: InventHelp Inventor Develops New Backyard Game (SBT-2264)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on June 12, 2026, an inventor from San Diego, California, shared plans for a new outdoor game called the BASE RACK. The inventor aimed to create a fun activity for social gatherings, blending elements of baseball with a need for precision. This invention is designed to engage players in physical skill while challenging their delicate touch.

data.title: Sustainable Pharmaceutical Packaging Market to reach USD 270.4 billion by 2031, Wissen Research
data.description: In Sheridan, Wyoming, a recent study by Wissen Research indicates significant growth in the global sustainable pharmaceutical packaging sector. The market is expected to increase from USD 114.5 billion in 2025 to USD 270.4 billion by 2031, showing a strong compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 15.4% throughout the forecast period.

data.title: SpaceX IPO: First Indicative Price At $174 Per Share
data.description: Space Exploration Technologies Corp. (SPCX) is set to begin trading on the Nasdaq Global Select Market with an anticipated opening price of $174 per share, a substantial 29% increase from its $135 IPO price. This marks one of the most highly awaited public offerings in history. The indicative opening price is determined through a process known as price indication, with the exchange's market maker constantly updating the real-time Indicative Opening Price (IOP) based on live order book demand until the opening bell triggers the first transaction. Investors can track the latest developments and updates as SPCX stock enters the market today.
